title: SSP Expansion
description: SSP expansion was a mod for the server ssp ran by Eggglitchttv on twitch
body:
SSP Expansion is a mod that mainly is for creative mod use that adds music disks new food and blue sculk Bewarned some items can only be obtained via creative mode sorry the mod adds these creative only items: heart, lungs, liver and warden heart. You can now cook rotten flesh as a new food source and music disks that are easy to find

SSP is a server ran by eggglitchttv There twitch link is: [https://www.twitch.tv/eggglitchttv](https://www.twitch.tv/eggglitchttv)

Development on this mod stopped due to the ending of SSP

Mod by Voidless_Studios/Walking_voidd 

music disks contain copyrighted music (mostly epic the musical as request of eggglitchttv)

Mod dev links:
Twitch main: [https://www.twitch.tv/walking_voidd](https://www.twitch.tv/walking_voidd)
Twitch alt: [https://www.twitch.tv/voidd_walking](https://www.twitch.tv/voidd_walking)
Discord: https://discord.gg/nzuytbFmhx
